name: Trip albums
description: Deterministic clustering — no model turns: photos taken in a burst of days separated by long gaps become a proposed album; publishing is your review click, and top-ups never remove what you curated.
prompt: Group my photos into trip albums: photos captured close together in time, separated from the rest by a long gap, belong to one trip. Propose each trip as a draft album named by its dates. Never publish an album yourself and never remove photos from albums I've curated.

vault.why: Reads photo capture times, clusters trips by time gaps (plain code — issue #290's agents-write-code doctrine, no model turns), and stages album proposals for review (issue #299 phase 3).
